arguman-legal.title: arguman.ai — Turkish Legal Research
arguman-legal.description: Multilingual hybrid search and citation lookup across Yargıtay, Danıştay, AYM, ECtHR (original-language HUDOC), Uyuşmazlık Mahkemesi, and German BGH case law. Turkish queries surface relevant English/French/German judgments via cross-lingual embeddings. Turkish criminal sentence-enforcement calculation included.
